suggest.monolog/monolog: Great logger to use, but you can pick any PSR-3 logger you wish.
suggest.php-http/cache-plugin: When making use of cache, you need to install this plugin.
suggest.psr/cache-implementation: If you wish to enable caching features, provide an PSR-6 cache implementation.
suggest.psr/log-implementation: If you wish to enable logging features, provide an PSR-3 logger.
suggest.psr/simple-cache-implementation: If you wish to enable caching features, provide an PSR-16 cache.
suggest.symfony/cache: Great cache to use, but you can pick any PSR-6 cache you wish.

packages.description: PHP wrapper for TMDB (TheMovieDatabase) API v3. Supports two types of approaches, one modelled with repositories, models and factories. And the other by simple array access to RAW data from The Movie Database.
